news.title: What To Expect From DSV AS (DSDVY) Q1 2026 Earnings
news.summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus.  The consensus estimate for Q1 2026 revenue is $11.36 billion, and the earnings are expected to come in at $0.74 per share.  Over the past 90 days, revenue estimates for DSV AS (DSDVY) have increased from $45.65 billion to $45.98 billion for the full year 2026 and increased from $46.49 billion to $47.80 billion for 2027.

news.title: Iran war and AI advances are creating winners and losers among transport stocks
news.summary: As the Iran war enters its fourth week, analysts warn that AI could double profits for freight leaders while sinking laggards.
